title: The Duel in the Mirror World
description: On pages 14–15, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Luffy, Unknown person #14 as Luffy and Katakuri push their duel to its emotional peak while Sanji moves the cake plan toward the escape route.
scene: Luffy and Katakuri turn their fight into a battle of respect, endurance, and future sight.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: This is the end, straw HAAAT!!!

summary: This section advances the Luffy vs Katakuri storyline with 12 dialogue beats. Luffy and Katakuri push each other beyond technique, turning the fight into a test of conviction.
